http_400_message: Bad request. Please check your input.
http_401_message: You need to sign in to continue.
http_403_message: You don't have permission to access this resource.
http_404_message: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
http_405_message: This action isn't supported for the requested resource.
http_408_message: The request took too long. Please try again.
http_410_message: This resource is no longer available.
http_415_message: The request format isn't supported. Please try again.
http_422_message: Validation failed. Please check your input.
http_429_message: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
http_500_message: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again later.
http_502_message: We couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
http_503_message: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
http_504_message: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.
